scripts.start: npm run backend && npm run frontend:serve
scripts.backend: npm run backend:install && npm run backend:run
scripts.backend:install: cd backend && npm run backend:venv && npm run backend:pip && npm run backend:playwright
scripts.backend:venv: if not exist .venv (python -m venv .venv) else echo venv exists
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.frontend:dev: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.frontend:serve: cd frontend && npm install && npm run preview
scripts.install:all: npm run backend:install && npm run frontend
scripts.health: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/health || echo "❌ Backend not running"
scripts.test:route: curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/route -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"start_address\":\"Ленина 111, Киров\",\"end_address\":\"Ульяновская 30, Киров\",\"use_traffic\":true}"
